weather.note: Change 'location' to any city when traveling — works globally via wttr.in

notion.note: Requires Notion MCP connected at claude.ai/settings/connectors

discord_webhook.note: Leave url empty — the webhook URL is passed via the trigger's bootstrap prompt so it stays out of the repo

email.note: Requires email MCP connector (e.g. Resend) at claude.ai/settings/connectors

sms.note: Requires Twilio or similar MCP connector at claude.ai/settings/connectors
